item.title: Prompt Engineering
item.description: Prompt Engineering, also known as In-Context Prompting, refers to methods for how to communicate with LLM to steer its behavior for desired outcomes without updating the model weights.

item.title: An Overview of Deep Learning for Curious People
item.description: An overview of deep learning for curious people. AlphaGo, CNNs, RNNs, autoencoders, GANs, reinforcement learning.
